name: AM Meeting Rollout Control Center
scope: Per-group meeting mode stored in project-local Group Bindings
formalTasksEnabled compatibility ceiling and fail-closed enforcement
requiresDatabases: Existing project-local LINE group bindings source with standard core fields
Existing project-local meetings and review sources required by AM-IMP-2026.0720.01
Existing project-local formal tasks source for review_and_create mode
requiresEnv: Existing target-local Portal tenant-wide group-manager authentication configuration
Existing target-local public base URL and signed review-link configuration
Existing per-tenant LINE Messaging API and published LIFF configuration for review modes
Existing target-local transcription, AI, and media-storage configuration
requiresScripts: Target-local production smoke test for each enabled tenant

dataIsolation.guard: Install the control behavior independently in every target. Group settings are scoped by target, tenant, and group. Never copy LINE identities, member mappings, meeting or task records, database identifiers, credentials, environment values, or deployment state between projects.

changes: Adds four meeting rollout modes: off, record_only, review_only, and review_and_create
Uses the tenant formalTasksEnabled setting as the compatibility ceiling for each group request
Adds tenant tabs, group selection, batch mode selection, preflight, and batch apply
Adds safe initialization of meeting-management fields in the existing Group Bindings source
Adds mode-aware preflight that blocks unsafe activation with actionable reasons
Restricts mutation and schema initialization to the tenant-wide Portal group manager
Records last setter, time, setting version, and preflight metadata in each updated group binding
Invalidates the server-resolved group router cache after a successful update
Preserves existing meeting behavior when a legacy group has no explicit meeting mode
Separates one-time LIFF, Render, Notion, LINE, storage, transcription, and AI setup from checkbox activation
definitionOfDone: All four production enum values and Chinese labels have server-enforced behavior and are visible in Portal
Tenant tabs show only authorized project-local Group Bindings rows
A group request cannot exceed the formalTasksEnabled tenant ceiling and invalid policy fails closed
Only the tenant-wide Portal group manager can initialize schema or batch-apply changes
Mode-aware preflight prevents activation when required project-local prerequisites are missing
Missing management fields can be safely initialized without replacing incompatible existing fields
A successful group setting records setter/time/version/preflight metadata and affects new meetings without redeployment
The server invalidates only the updated group IDs read from authorized binding rows
Existing enabled and disabled meeting behavior is preserved when no explicit group mode exists
The checkbox never creates LIFF, Render, Notion, LINE, storage, transcription, or AI infrastructure
Meeting and task data remain isolated inside each target and tenant
The target project manifest and project-local upgrade record are updated after verification
Production is marked Deployed only after target-specific authorization, isolation, and meeting smoke tests pass
